extensionDescription.message: Hide and toggle ads with unreliable motors on car listings (PureTech, THP, BlueHDi, etc.)

adsHiddenOnThisPage.message: unreliable ads hidden on this page

privacyDescription.message: To hide unreliable car advertisements, this extension must access and analyze the content of the pages you visit on supported car listing websites.

privacyPoint1.message: Local analysis of ad text (titles and descriptions)

privacyPoint2.message: No data is collected, stored, or transmitted to third parties
